title: [Triggered] RCA task task_6 — Market/cloudbed-1
message: The cloud service system, cloudbed-1, experienced one failure within the time range of March 20, 2022, from 09:00 to 09:30. The specific component responsible for this failure and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying the root cause component and the root cause reason.
